retrievalCases.name: basic retrieval
retrievalCases.task: fix lockfile drift in package installs

memories.label: pnpm-rule
memories.content: Use pnpm for package installs to avoid lockfile drift.

memories.label: unrelated-design
memories.content: Use compact cards for the dashboard layout.

memories.label: stale-npm-rule
memories.content: Use npm install for package installs.

memories.label: local-adapter-rule
memories.content: This project runs adapter tests with pnpm test.

memories.label: foreign-adapter-rule
memories.content: Foreign project runs adapter tests with yarn test.

memories.label: pinned-pnpm
memories.content: Always use pnpm for package operations in this repository.

memories.label: unrelated-route-note
memories.content: Use route handlers for hosted API endpoints.

retrievalCases.name: mistake and regression retrieval
retrievalCases.task: repair the migration rollback test without repeating sqlite transaction mistake

memories.label: sqlite-rollback-mistake
memories.content: A sqlite migration rollback failed when a transaction was opened inside another transaction.

memories.label: unrelated-cli-fix
memories.content: Dashboard snapshots omitted compact card spacing.

retrievalCases.name: conflict handling
retrievalCases.task: choose package manager for test runs

memories.label: low-priority-npm-tests
memories.content: Prefer npm scripts for test runs.

memories.label: safe-credential-policy
memories.content: Keep credential examples redacted in docs and tests.

memories.label: blocked-credential-note
memories.content: Blocked credential placeholder DO_NOT_LEAK_SENTINEL must never be injected.

packetGolden.task: run v1 eval vitest checks without render jobs or live llm calls

memories.label: no-render-policy
memories.content: Do not run full render jobs during eval verification.

memories.label: deterministic-vitest-decision
memories.content: Use deterministic Vitest fixtures for V1 eval coverage.

memories.label: no-live-llm-attempt
memories.content: Generating eval expectations from live LLM calls is disallowed.

contextDelta.task: run package tests for the release branch
contextDelta.expectedMemoryAwareText: Always use pnpm before running package tests.

memories.label: pnpm-context-rule
memories.content: Always use pnpm before running package tests.
